title: Terracotta Shingles
description: Decorate your builds with the vibrancy of colourful roof tiles!
body:
# Terracotta Shingles

# 🎨 Variants
 Adding **17 variants** to decorate your builds with! Make your roofs stand out by giving them the hue and vibrancy of Terracotta, with **Walls, Slabs & Stairs** so you can build in all shapes and sizes. 
![Kai, barely visible, standing under a roof made out of Light Blue & Green Terracotta Shingle Stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa7524aacb5aee2e95496511283cfb851a5e1e93.png)

---
# ⚒️ Crafting & dyeing
You can **craft** Terracotta into Terracotta Shingles by combining Terracotta in a 2x2 grid in your Inventory or Crafting Table! You can also dye unstained Terracotta Shingles in the same way as you would Terracotta (this works for Walls, Slabs & Stairs too!).\
ℹ️ *If you would like to **universally dye** (a.k.a. regardless of the existing colour of the input) your Terracotta Shingles, you can enable this via the optional*  ```terracotta_shingles:universal_dyeing``` *datapack!*
![1. Crafting Table GUI with White Dye in the center slot, surrounded by Terracotta Shingles in all 8 slots, showing an output of 8 White Terracotta Shingles. 2. Survival Inventory GUI with 4 Blue Terracotta in the 4 crafting slots, showing an output of 4 Blue Terracotta Shingles. 3. Outside of the GUI's Sunny is looking down at a Crafting Table and Ari is looking down into her hands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56b92db3c9d9f58ecfde148e2e6d57a89f92ae1.png)

---
# 👷🏽 Stonecutting & Mason
The **Stonecutter** allows you to cut Terracotta straight into Terracotta Shingles and its variants! Meanwhile, an expert level Mason can also give you access to a random color of Terracotta Shingles!

![1. Stonecutter GUI with Cyan Terracotta as input on the left, 4 options in the center (Cyan Terracotta Shingle Slab, Cyan Terracotta Shingle Stairs (selected), Cyan Terracotta Shingle Wall, Cyan Terracotta Shingles), and Cyan Terracotta Shingle Stairs as output on the right. 2. A Trading GUI with 3 options on the left (Emerald -> 10 Bricks, Emerald -> Magenta Terracotta Shingles (selected), Emerald -> Lime Terracotta), in the left input slots are 3 Emeralds, in the output slot is Magenta Terracotta Shingles. The XP-bar is filled for about 20%, and the Mason is an expert. 3. Outside of the GUI's there is an animated stonecutter and a Plains Mason looking up at the trading GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88a0c266b97f9a3997fa3c53cdd249808d6bef5.webp)

---
# 🎵 Unique Sounds 
Noise! Terracotta Shingles come with **Unique Sounds** to satisfy your ears with and immerse yourself into the world!

![A platform of Light Gray Terracotta Shingles, with Steve walking on it and Alex placing an Orange Terracotta Shingle Wall on it. Both actions have music notes around them to indicate that they make noise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8d187f2ddccd40a8b25c75a6419481caec73936.png)
